summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ new features completed successfully. All 9 requested features verified working in demo mode.
passed_tests: Demo Mode persists across page navigations (Dashboard → Team → Services → Lead Rotation → Performance → Training → Settings)
52-Week Lead Rotation page shows Q1-Q4 quarters with week assignments (Weeks 1-13, 14-26, 27-39, 40-52)
Lead Rotation shows stats: Total Weeks (52), Assigned (12), Unassigned (40), Available Leads (2)
Performance Metrics page shows Team Reliability Leaderboard with 4 team members
Performance page shows summary cards: Total Services, Total Rotas, Service Reports, Total Assignments, Confirmation Rate
Performance page shows Assignment Status breakdown: Confirmed, Pending, Declined, Total
Training Center has Videos tab (2 videos) and Materials tab (2 materials)
Training Materials shows PDF/PPT cards with Open buttons
Settings page has Download Templates section with 3 templates
Settings page shows column requirements for each template (Team Members: name, email, role, phone, skills; Services: title, date, time, type; Equipment: name, category, status, notes)
Notification bell shows in sidebar with unread count badge (1)
Notification dropdown shows notifications with 'Mark all read' button
All 12 navigation items visible in sidebar: Dashboard, Team, Services, Assign Rotas, My Rotas, Lead Rotation, Equipment, Checklists, Reports, Performance, Training, Settings
test_credentials: Demo mode - no credentials required. Click 'Try Demo Mode' button on login page.
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses mock data defined in React components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested successfully in demo mode. New features include: 52-week lead rotation planner (Q1-Q4 with week assignments), performance metrics with team reliability leaderboard, training center with videos and materials tabs (PDF/PPT/DOC support), settings page with CSV import templates showing column requirements, in-app notifications with bell icon and unread count. Navigation now has 12 items. Demo mode uses localStorage to persist state and mock data defined in React components.
mocked_api_note: DEMO MODE uses MOCKED data - all API calls return demo data when demoMode is true in localStorage. WhatsApp/Twilio notifications require real credentials to send messages.

demo_mode_persistence.details: Demo mode persists across all page navigations via localStorage

lead_rotation_52_week.details: 52-Week Lead Rotation page shows Q1-Q4 quarters (Weeks 1-13, 14-26, 27-39, 40-52) with week assignments, date ranges, and lead names

performance_metrics.details: Team Reliability Leaderboard shows 4 members with columns: Name, Role, Assignments, Confirmed, Confirmation %, Attended, Attendance %, Reliability Score

training_center.details: Videos tab shows 2 video cards, Materials tab shows 2 material cards (PDF, PPT) with Open buttons

settings_templates.details: Download Templates section shows 3 templates with column requirements displayed

notification_bell.details: Notification bell in sidebar shows unread count (1), dropdown shows notifications with 'Mark all read' button

navigation_12_items.details: All 12 navigation items visible: Dashboard, Team, Services, Assign Rotas, My Rotas, Lead Rotation, Equipment, Checklists, Reports, Performance, Training, Settings
